Connections Newsletters 
Jan. 19, 2024 
At a glance 
Connections newsletter provides the latest updates from CDC's National Center for HIV, Viral Hepatitis, STD, and Tuberculosis Prevention. It includes news on recent guidance documents, publications highlights, new products, news media updates, and upcoming events and observances.
Get connected with Connections 
NCHHSTP shares the latest updates in science, research, policy, and communications in these Connections newsletters.
Subscribe to Connections to Get: 
Insight into our work at NCHHSTP, including more personalized stories Recent publications from peer-reviewed journals and CDC's MMWR News media updates via our NCHHS
